search_document:
User Request: Show me everything.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend
Title: Top Customers by Region
Type: table
Description: Highest spending customers aggregated by region
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue
Title: Product Performance
Type: chart
Description: Sales performance of products
Title: Order Trends
Type: chart
Description: Trends in order volume over time
Title: Customer Demographics
Type: pie_chart
Description: Distribution of customers by type
Title: Employee Performance
Type: table
Description: Sales performance by employee
Title: Inventory Levels
Type: bar_chart
Description: Current inventory levels of products
Title: Shipping Performance
Type: kpi
Description: Average shipping time

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Customers by Region
sql_queries.description: Highest spending customers aggregated by region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.Region, c.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSpending FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY c.Region, c.CompanyName ORDER BY c.Region, TotalSpending DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM "Order Details" od

sql_queries.title: Product Performance
sql_queries.sql: SELECT p.ProductName, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalQuantitySold FROM Products p JOIN "Order Details" od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductName ORDER BY TotalQuantitySold DESC

sql_queries.title: Order Trends
sql_queries.description: Trends in order volume over time
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, COUNT(OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Customer Demographics
sql_queries.sql: SELECT cd.CustomerDesc, COUNT(ccd.CustomerID) AS CustomerCount FROM CustomerDemographics cd JOIN CustomerCustomerDemo ccd ON cd.CustomerTypeID = ccd.CustomerTypeID GROUP BY cd.CustomerDesc

sql_queries.title: Employee Performance
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY TotalSales DESC

sql_queries.title: Inventory Levels
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ProductName, UnitsInStock FROM Products ORDER BY UnitsInStock DESC

sql_queries.title: Shipping Performance
sql_queries.sql: SELECT AVG(julianday(ShippedDate) - julianday(OrderDate)) AS AvgShippingTime FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate IS NOT NULL
